lane: CPU (ONNX Runtime, CPUExecutionProvider) — pruning axis of the Pareto, no GPU
pruning: masks: torch.nn.utils.prune.l1_unstructured per Conv2d/Linear leaf module, baked via per-module prune.remove (mask wrappers bypassed due to documented torch>=2.12 drift; same L1 magnitude criterion). structured: edgevision.pruning.channel_prune_conv_chain — true L1 channel removal (rebuilt Conv2d/Linear modules, fewer params/FLOPs)

model.export_path: torch legacy TorchScript exporter (dynamo=False, opset 17) for all rows
model.accuracy_note: Randomly initialized model — 'fidelity' rows are output similarity vs the unpruned model, NOT task accuracy. No trained checkpoint exists in checkpoints/.

fidelity.metric: output fidelity vs unpruned FP32 (random-init model; NOT task accuracy)
